raw_responses.BFI-10_1: Sean O'Sullivan describes himself as being involved in activism, debate, and community work, which suggests he is socially engaged and willing to speak up about issues he cares about. raw_responses.BFI-10_4: Sean has acknowledged experiencing stress and burnout, particularly during intense periods of study and activism.
